_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE label data for the DEMO ONLY. NOT real FDA labels, NOT clinically validated. Hand-authored so the safety gate + validated-dose path actually fire in the demo. demo_app.py loads this if present; without it the engine runs mechanism-only. Generate real data with clinical_data.py for production.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Relief of ischemic chest pain (angina) and management of acute coronary syndrome.
label_sections.contraindications: Severe hypotension (systolic blood pressure below 90 mmHg), shock, or concurrent use of PDE5 inhibitors.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: May cause headache and reflex tachycardia. Use caution with volume depletion.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 0.4 mg sublingually every 5 minutes, up to 3 doses.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Antiplatelet therapy in acute coronary syndrome and secondary prevention of myocardial infarction.
label_sections.contraindications: Known aspirin or NSAID hypersensitivity; active gastrointestinal bleeding.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 162-325 mg chewed at presentation, then 81 mg orally once daily.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Reduces myocardial oxygen demand in acute coronary syndrome, angina, and hypertension.
label_sections.contraindications: Severe bradycardia, second- or third-degree heart block, cardiogenic shock, decompensated heart failure.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: Avoid in acute hypotension. May mask hypoglycemia. Do not withdraw abruptly.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Additive effects with calcium channel blockers.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 25-50 mg orally every 6-12 hours once hemodynamically stable.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Anticoagulation in acute coronary syndrome and venous thromboembolism.
label_sections.contraindications: Active major bleeding; history of heparin-induced thrombocytopenia.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: Monitor for bleeding; check platelet count.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Antiplatelet agents and NSAIDs increase bleeding risk.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 60 units/kg IV bolus (max 4000 units), then 12 units/kg/hour infusion, titrated to aPTT.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Relief of bronchospasm in asthma and reversible obstructive airway disease.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: May cause tachycardia, palpitations, and tremor. Use caution in cardiovascular disease.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Non-selective beta blockers antagonize the effect.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 2.5 mg via nebulizer every 20 minutes for 3 doses in acute exacerbation.

label_sections.contraindications: There are no absolute contraindications in anaphylaxis (life-threatening).
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: May cause tachycardia, hypertension, and arrhythmia; use caution in coronary disease but never withhold in anaphylaxis.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Effects potentiated by MAO inhibitors and tricyclic antidepressants.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 0.3-0.5 mg (1:1000) intramuscularly into the mid-outer thigh; repeat every 5-15 minutes as needed.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Adjunctive antihistamine for allergic reactions and urticaria.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: Causes sedation; additive CNS depression with other sedatives.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Additive sedation with alcohol and CNS depressants.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 25-50 mg orally every 4-6 hours as needed.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease and acid-peptic disorders.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: Long-term use associated with hypomagnesemia and fracture risk.
label_sections.drug_interactions: May increase the effect of warfarin; monitor INR. Reduces clopidogrel activation.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: 20 mg orally once daily before a meal for 4-8 weeks.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Reduces gastric acid for heartburn and reflux.
label_sections.drug_interactions: May alter absorption of pH-dependent drugs.

label_sections.indications_and_usage: Treatment of hypertension and heart failure.
label_sections.contraindications: History of angioedema; pregnancy; concomitant aliskiren in diabetes.
label_sections.warnings_and_precautions: Can cause hyperkalemia and worsening renal function; monitor potassium and creatinine.
label_sections.drug_interactions: Potassium-sparing diuretics and supplements increase hyperkalemia risk; NSAIDs reduce effect.
label_sections.use_in_specific_populations: Reduce dose in renal impairment (creatinine clearance below 30 mL/min); contraindicated in pregnancy.

dose_rules.dose_text_verbatim: Initial 10 mg orally once daily; titrate to 20-40 mg daily.
